metadata.title: Boogie Wonderland (with The Emotions)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:17.09] Dance
[00:19.74] Boogie Wonderland, hey, hey
[00:24.44] Dance
[00:27.39] Boogie Wonderland
[00:31.79] Midnight creeps so slowly into hearts of men who need more than they get
[00:39.15] Daylight deals a bad hand to a woman who has laid too many bets
[00:46.54] The mirror stares you in the face and says, "Baby, uh, uh, it don't work"
[00:53.91] You say your prayers, though you don't care
[00:57.43] You dance and shake the hat

[01:03.55] Boogie Wonderland, hey, hey
[01:08.46] Dance (dance)
[01:11.00] Boogie Wonderland (yeah, yeah)
[01:15.66] Sound fly through the night
[01:17.80] I chase my vinyl dreams to Boogie Wonderland
[01:23.09] I find romance when I start to dance in Boogie Wonderland
[01:30.26] I find romance when I start to dance in Boogie Wonderland
[01:37.48] All the love in the world can't be gone
[01:42.09] 
[01:45.07] All the need to be loved can't be wrong
[01:50.12] All the records are playing, and my heart keeps saying, "Boogie Wonderland, Wonderland"
